source_code:
# source: https://github.com/ray-project/ray/issues/43401
# repo: ray-project/ray
# title: [Core] Pydantic ValidationErrors cannot be handled by Ray
# 
# ### What happened + What you expected to happen
# Pydantic v2.0 introduced a `ValidationError` class that cannot be inherited, which breaks Ray's error propagation mechanism which creates `RayTaskError`/`RayActorError` on the fly by dynamically subclassing the original exception.
# ### Versions / Dependencies
# Ray 2.9.1
# pydantic 2.6
# ### Reproduction script
# Instead of the pydantic exception being propagated, the following will be raised:
# ### Issue Severity
# Medium: It causes significant difficulty but can work it around.
